mechanism: AI capex is deployed by the same concentrated cohort (Mag7/hyperscalers) that drives market concentration. Sustained capex maintains revenue growth and ROIC advantage, reinforcing concentration. Capex disappointment would trigger earnings disappointment in the concentrated cohort, unwinding concentration.
regime_dependence: Holds while hyperscalers maintain hedge-financed capex from FCF. Would break if AI revenue realization fails to reach 2-3x consensus TAM, converting the capex from value-creating to value-destroying.
